untranslatable_reason: Ascending Broadening Wedge is a complex price pattern requiring trend line identification, multiple touches detection, and broadening width measurement. These geometric pattern properties cannot be expressed using only the available price indicators and operators. The pattern requires custom multi-bar analysis logic to detect: (1) ascending upper and lower trend lines, (2) at least 3 touches of each trend line, (3) expanding distance between lines over time. No combination of allowed indicators can reliably encode this pattern definition.
translation_notes: This is a visual/geometric price pattern that requires specialized pattern recognition algorithms. The entry/exit conditions provided above are approximate proxies using volume and price momentum, but do not capture the true Ascending Broadening Wedge formation as described by Bulkowski. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection code outside the scope of indicator-based rule translation.
